disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cardiac features — no chest pain, no breathlessness at rest/on exertion beyond fatigue, no palpitations, no ankle swelling, no exertional syncope (screens post-viral myocarditis)
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, breathlessness at rest, a racing or irregular heartbeat, ankle swelling, or blackouts on exertion?
Does your heart pound or skip when you rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain, no breathlessness at rest, no racing/irregular heartbeat, no ankle swelling or blackouts.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No 'sinister' organic red flags — no unexplained weight loss, no drenching night sweats, no persistent measured fever, no focal neurological deficit, no lymphadenopathy/bleeding (screens malignancy/chronic infection)
trigger_question_examples: Any unexplained weight loss, drenching night sweats, persistent measured fevers, or new lumps?
Any weakness, numbness or other focal symptoms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No weight loss, night sweats or measured fevers, no lumps, and no weakness or numbness.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fatigue directly followed a viral illness, with unrefreshing sleep and post-exertional malaise (crashes after minor effort)
trigger_question_examples: Did this start right after a viral illness, and do you 'crash' for a day or two after even small activities?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it started after the cold, my sleep is unrefreshing, and small activities put me in bed for a day or two.
